rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHERINE ESTHER HINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. Issues: 1. Attorney is requesting $26,995.82 in statutory compensation, $6,064.77 in reimbursement for expenditures and $60,690.00 for extraordinary services. Ordinary timesheets attached to 3/26/2021 Declaration of Robert Cowan do not follow LRSF 14.54. 2. Examiner questioned on Schedule B of the Sellers statement the entry $20,000.00 for extra work management fee Adebowale Sodipo. It appears $20,000.00 was paid to Adebowale Sodipo out of escrow "to cover project management of the expanded scope, interior design/material choices, and also partly as a performance bonus. 3. Examiner requested an explanation why the administrator's compensation should not be reduced by the amount paid to Marion Hines for assisting with various administrative duties. See 12/28 Declaration of Alvin Hines page 2 paragraph 3. In response the attorney declaration says "I spoke with Marion Hines who affirmed to me that she is making no claim against the estate in exchange for her assistance to the estate's administrator." 4. Alvin Hines is requesting reimbursement of $64,937.65.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Ccp Section 425.16) Second Amended Petition Under Probate Code Sections 850, 859
rulings.Rulings: The hearing on this motion will be advanced to April 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m.
